summary: CRITICAL GAPS: (1) Actions unpinned to SHA (actions/checkout@v4 must be pinned; best practices violation). (2) NO TEST FILES despite task requiring red/green TDD + bun test. (3) NO FIXTURE DATA (workflow refs fixtures/cleanup.config.json but files missing). (4) NO TEST HARNESS for act (task requires act push runs, act-result.txt, fixture validation—completely absent). (5) NO package.json/bun.lock (frozen-lockfile will fail). Core logic is well-typed with good error handling and separation of concerns (cleanup.ts pure functions, clear CLI args parsing), but deliverable is fundamentally incomplete.
